name: Jiguang Push
description: Aurora Mobiles (极光) push notification, IM, authentication, and user analytics suite with 700k+ developers.

seo.title: Jiguang Push — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Jiguang Push: Aurora Mobiles (极光) push notification, IM, authentication, and user analytics suite with 700k+ developers.

when_to_use: Push notifications for Chinese Android apps across fragmented OEM ecosystem
IM and in-app messaging SDK for Chinese market mobile products
User profile and behavioral analytics via Aurora Mobile (极光) unified SDK
Authenticated delivery of transactional push for Chinese fintech or commerce apps

pros: Bundles IM, auth, and analytics into one SDK
Broad coverage of Chinese vendor push channels
Free tier usable for most apps
cons: SDK footprint large if you use the full suite
Data governance concerns for non-China data
Support outside China is effectively absent
review.verdict: Default push provider for China-first apps — low friction if you are local, painful if you are not.
review.best_for: Chinese apps wanting push plus IM plus auth in one stack
review.not_for: Global apps outside China or strict data sovereignty needs
